title: Barista - Window Title Editor
description: Allows you to customize the window title bar and icon. Also appends useful game information using a modular json configuration.

![Keybindings](https://i.imgur.com/lT5ZpPQ.png)
![Modules](https://i.imgur.com/Iwd0fTD.png)

## Versions
* 1.19 | Fabric & Forge
* 1.18 | Fabric & Forge
* 1.17 | Fabric & Forge
* 1.16 | Fabric & Forge
